mapper.select:
select * from user
and username like '%${keyword}%'
order by updated_at desc
select id, username, password, nickname, phone, role, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from user where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update user set status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
update user set role = #{role}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(id) from user where is_deleted = 0
select count(id) from category where is_deleted = 0
select count(id) from orders where status = '待发货'
select count(id) from book where is_deleted = 0
select orders.id, order_no, user.username, total_amount, orders.status, orders.created_at from orders inner join user on orders.user_id = user.id order by orders.created_at desc
